source: user request 2026-05-08 — 'i want u to clean the context box for pi like bro it looks messy compact it'
title: Compact 3-line startup banner; lazy-load awareness; silent health check
what_failed: Startup printed 12+ lines: 'Loading awareness…', 5-line health-check table, 4 init lines (Agent initialized / Session ID / Mode / Consciousness chars), full daily briefing, then reminders. Verbose, intimidating, made the project feel disorganised.
where_failed: pi_agent.py __init__ and run() — verbose-by-default prints; awareness eagerly fetched on every cold start (3-5s cost).
why_likely: Output was added incrementally over many phases without any consolidation pass.
suggested_fix: Default to silent: only print on failure. Add agent/startup_banner.py with a compact 3-line format (mode/session/tools, telegram/scheduler/verify/turns, reminders/tickets/help). Make awareness lazy via @property — first read triggers the snapshot fetch. Provide --verbose-init and --eager-awareness flags for the legacy behaviour.
fix_applied: Added agent/startup_banner.py::format_banner (pure function). Modified agent/health.py::run_health_check to take verbose=False and only print failures by default. pi_agent.__init__ now reads --eager-awareness flag and otherwise leaves _awareness_snapshot_cache=None. Added @property awareness_snapshot that lazy-loads on first read and a setter for the refresh_awareness tool. run() prints only the 3-line banner via format_banner. Added 'help' command listing all top-level commands.
tests: testing/test_startup_banner.py — 9 passing tests covering format_banner, _read_verify_status, _count_open_tickets, and pluralisation.
